events.title: Iran War Oil Shock And High Prices Will Trigger 'Demand ... - Forbes
events.content:
The agency reiterated that the ongoing oil supply disruption, caused by the closure of the Strait of Hormuz amid the Iran War, is the “largest disruption in history.”

The agency also projected that global oil output in 2026 will decline by 1.5 million bpd from last year, reversing its earlier forecast of a 1.1 million bpd increase.
